skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem:
4x + y = −15

2x² = y + 255

The graphs of the equations in the given system intersect at the point (x, y) in the xy-plane. What is a possible value of x?
rationale: Choice D is correct. From the first equation, y = −15 − 4x. Substituting into the second equation: 2x² = −15 − 4x + 255, so 2x² + 4x − 240 = 0, or x² + 2x − 120 = 0. Factoring: (x + 12)(x − 10) = 0, so x = −12 or x = 10. Only −12 is listed.
